page_metadata.biotools__summary: Simple command-line tool that enables rapid and flexible production of text tables tailored for aggregation plots from which users can easily design multiple groups based on user-definitions such as regulatory regions or transcription initiation sites.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Simple command-line tool that enables rapid and flexible production of text tables tailored for aggregation plots from which users can easily design multiple groups based on user-definitions such as regulatory regions or transcription initiation sites.
